title: Configuration Loading and Merging
interaction_flow: Config → Config: setSourceOfConfigValue(..., SOURCE_DEFAULT) for each default key
Factory → Factory: getHomeDir() → checks COMPOSER_HOME, APPDATA/XDG env vars
Factory → Config: merge(['config' => [home, cache-dir, data-dir]], SOURCE_DEFAULT)
Factory → Config: get('htaccess-protect') → checks COMPOSER_HTACCESS_PROTECT env, returns bool
Factory → Factory: validateJsonSchema($io, $file, AUTH_SCHEMA) [if file exists]
Factory → JsonFile: validateJsonSchema(source, $authData, AUTH_SCHEMA) [if env set]
Factory → Factory: getComposerFile() → checks COMPOSER env var, defaults to ./composer.json
Factory → Factory: createConfig($io, $cwd) [loads global config+auth as above]
Factory → Config: merge($localConfig, $composerFile path) [local composer.json overrides]
Factory → Factory: validateJsonSchema($io, $localAuthFile, AUTH_SCHEMA) [if local auth.json exists]
Factory → Factory: loadComposerAuthEnv($config, $io) [re-apply COMPOSER_AUTH on top]
Factory → Config: get('vendor-dir') [resolves {$refs} via process(), expands env vars]
Factory → IOInterface: loadConfiguration($config) [loads auth tokens into IO]
RepositoryFactory → Config: getRepositories() [reads merged repo list]
Config: special array_merge for: bitbucket-oauth, github-oauth, gitlab-oauth, gitlab-token, http-basic, bearer, forgejo-token
Config: special allow-plugins merge: local wins over global (triple merge)
Config: preferred-install: converts string→['*'=>val], appends, keeps '*' last
Config: audit: merges ignore arrays, other keys override
Config: repositories: reversed merge (new repos prepend), handles false=disable, packagist auto-deactivation
Config → Platform: getEnv('COMPOSER_FOO_BAR') [env override for path/bool keys]
Config → Config: process($value, $flags) → replaces {$key} refs via recursive get()
Config → Config: realpath($path) → prepends baseDir if relative
ConfigReturnTypeExtension → ConfigReturnTypeExtension: parseType($conf, $prop) per schema property
ConfigReturnTypeExtension → Scope: getType($args[0]) → extracts constant string key
ConfigReturnTypeExtension → ConfigReturnTypeExtension: returns narrowed PHPStan Type for Config::get($key)
key_relationships: Factory uses JsonFile to read config.json, auth.json, composer.json
Factory creates JsonConfigSource (wraps JsonFile) and sets on Config as configSource / authConfigSource / localAuthConfigSource
Config.merge() called multiple times: defaults → global config.json → global auth.json → COMPOSER_AUTH env → local composer.json → local auth.json → COMPOSER_AUTH env (re-applied)
Config.get() delegates to Config.process() for variable replacement, Platform for env vars
RepositoryFactory.manager() reads Config.getRepositories() to build repo list
ConfigReturnTypeExtension implements PHPStan DynamicMethodReturnTypeExtension for Config::get() — static analysis only, not runtime
JsonConfigSource implements ConfigSourceInterface and wraps JsonFile + JsonManipulator for write operations
merge_priority_order: 8. COMPOSER_AUTH env var (re-applied, wins over local auth)

config_key_resolution.path_keys: Check COMPOSER_FOO_BAR env → process {$ref} substitution → Platform::expandPath → realpath with baseDir
config_key_resolution.bool_keys: Some check env (cache-read-only, htaccess-protect, source-fallback), some do not
config_key_resolution.special_keys: github-protocols strips git if secure-http; bin-compat validates enum; discard-changes validates stash/bool; audit checks COMPOSER_AUDIT_ABANDONED env; filter checks COMPOSER_FILTER env

important_notes: Config::$defaultConfig is a static property with ~50 default keys. Variable replacement in values uses {$key} syntax resolved recursively. The COMPOSER_AUTH env is loaded twice intentionally — once after global files, once after local files — to always win. ConfigReturnTypeExtension is PHPStan-only and has zero runtime effect. RepositoryFactory.manager() is called from Factory.createComposer() after config is fully merged.
